6) Officer on promotion to the cadre of Naib Tehsildar directly after posting.
The benefit of promotion category salary will not be admissible unless joined.
7) The above officers shall be promoted to the rank of Deputy Tehsildar in the cadre of Deputy Tehsildar.
Failure to join the posts within 30 days will result in loss of service of the officer concerned.
Action will also be taken to cancel their promotions.
8) The officers concerned from the date of receipt of the order of posting pursuant to this provisional promotion.
No leave of any kind shall be granted without the prior approval of the Government.

The office of Divisional Commissioner, Chhatrapati Sambhaji Nagar Division will be in charge.
